themes.reasoning_notes: Directly destroys an artifact or land; land-destruction mode is specific and central to the card's gameplay use.
Also answers artifacts, but this is narrower than the card's broader land/artifact destruction role.
Creatures without flying can't block this turn, enabling a temporary alpha-strike or damage push.
`Destroy target artifact or land` cleanly supports land-destruction packages, but the card is a flexible hybrid answer rather than a dedicated LD payoff.
It directly removes an artifact, so artifact-hate is a real secondary tag and fits better than generic artifacts.
`Creatures without flying can't block this turn` acts as a Falter effect, mainly supporting damage pushes rather than defining the card.
